title: Techno Quick Bits
content:
[Internet Explorer 7](http://www.microsoft.com/windows/ie/default.mspx) was out about a week ago.

Shortly afterward, [Firefox 2.0](http://releases.mozilla.org/pub/mozilla.org/firefox/releases/2.0/) is out. (Not on the official site yet).

iPod nano [(PRODUCT) RED](http://www.apple.com/ipodnano/red/) .. "$10 of its purchase price to the Global Fund to fight AIDS in Africa" .. Too RED for my taste though.

Last but not least, [Macbook Pro](http://www.apple.com/macbookpro/) just got updated to Core 2 Duo (2.16 & 2.33 GHz!!!). Firewire 800 made a come back too. If you don't have one yet, the time is now. Damn! I want one too!

Peace~
